TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Fernando_Chui_Sai_On, title = Fernando_Chui_Sai_On, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fernando_Chui_Sai_On} }

S.FORM: = Fernando Chui Sai On = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 1 jiyax 13 ka Fernando Chui Sai On ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Macau ta sayang o kiya ka Fernando Chui Sai On, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 12 jiyax 20 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *əɾnando ʦħui sai on = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka *əɾnando ʦħui sai on ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan maʦau ta sajaŋ o kija ka *əɾnando ʦħui sai on, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Fernando Chui Sai On = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 1 jiyax 13 ka Fernando Chui Sai On ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Macau ta sayang o kiya ka Fernando Chui Sai On, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 12 jiyax 20 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *əɾnando ʦħui sai on = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka *əɾnando ʦħui sai on ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan maʦau ta sajaŋ o kija ka *əɾnando ʦħui sai on, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
